packageable_artifacts.role: Optional adjacent policy and hardening gate contract.
Machine-readable JSON Schemas for operations, manifests, adapters, and handoff metadata.
Synthetic validation fixtures without private workspace data.
Dependency-free validation of schemas, manifests, fixtures, and references.

local_only_boundaries.name: local adapter configuration
local_only_boundaries.reason: Contains private workspace paths, channel maps, visible-message destinations, local policy, and credentials.

local_only_boundaries.name: secrets and tokens
local_only_boundaries.reason: Must remain in local secret stores or CI/runtime secret mechanisms.

local_only_boundaries.name: private workspace memory
local_only_boundaries.reason: Not required for portable operation contracts and unsafe to distribute.

local_only_boundaries.name: Portage release mechanics
local_only_boundaries.reason: Portage owns packaging, doctor, install, release, rollback, and distribution implementation.

local_only_boundaries.name: Redshield enterprise configuration
local_only_boundaries.reason: Warden/Armor policy packs, tenant IDs, signing keys, and customer evidence belong to adjacent products or local deployments.

compatibility_guarantees: Draft v0.x contracts may evolve, but changes should update manifest versions and fixtures together.
Packageable artifacts must not require private local adapter data to validate.
Shared manifests may name adapter capabilities but must not embed local adapter configuration.
Operation schemas must declare side effects, approval gates, adapter capabilities, and error states before implementation.
Mutating operations must retain preview, gate, and fail-safe expectations as schemas are added.

inspectable_refs.purpose: Discover schema-backed operations and their refs.
Discover planned and schema-defined operation families.
Discover adapter capability names and disclosure policies.
Discover packageable artifacts, local-only boundaries, and compatibility guarantees.
Validate the current public/packageable contract set.
